propositions: Add four Claude Code skill directories (rebar-brainstorm, rebar-debug, rebar-implement, rebar-janitor) plus a README under examples/claude-skills/.
Skills serve as illustrative examples of agentic plan/implement/debug/maintain workflows using rebar as system of record.
Change is docs/examples only with no modifications to src/ or runtime behavior.
Committed content must contain no personal, host, secret, or absolute-path leakage.
rebar-implement review-and-land steps defer to project docs (rebar/Gerrit as default).
